name: Brinno TLC2020 Construction Bundle Outdoor Time Lapse Camera
description: The Brinno EMPOWER TLC2020-C Outdoor Time-Lapse Camera Bundle includes a TLC2020 time-lapse camera, an ATH1000 waterproof housing, an ACC1000P clamp mount kit, and bungee cords for a time-lapse video recording solution.

features.Key Features:: TLC2020 Time-Lapse Camera Included | ATH1000 Waterproof Housing Included | ACC1000P Clamp Mount Kit Included | 1080p Resolution | 2" TFT LCD Screen | 2.8mm Lens & 118° Field of View | Bungee Cords Included | Powered by Four AA Batteries | Battery Life up to 99 Days | Supports microSD Cards up to 128GB
